name: web-app/ts-hono-api
description: TypeScript on Node 22 — Hono HTTP API with Better Auth, better-sqlite3, and Stripe. SaaS back-end surface (ADR-0012).
_note: Catalog + families live in architecture/catalog.json (the fixed 7, ADR-0005/0009). Back-end API profile; MiniMax M3 (multimodal) stays unbound — UI work lives in web-app/react-vite. Roles v2 (ADR-0022): specs name a role (owner_role), NEVER a model — resolve_roles maps it here; the only spec-level pin is model_override/verifier_override + override_reason (gate risk-flags it). P8 is structural: verifier_secondary covers an author that shares the verifier's family.
